title: Fix: move Ternary UNet submission folder from track_10min_16mb to track_non_record_16mb
body:
Fixes #729

## Summary

PR #640 placed the 73.7M Ternary UNet submission under `records/track_10min_16mb/`, 
but it was accepted into the README as a **Notable Non-Record Run** — not the main 
leaderboard. This puts the folder in the wrong track directory.

## Changes

- Moved `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-24_74M_Ternary_UNet_FP8_10L_8192BPE_YaRN_NeoMuon/` 
  → `records/track_non_record_16mb/2026-03-24_74M_Ternary_UNet_FP8_10L_8192BPE_YaRN_NeoMuon/`
- Updated the info link in the Notable Non-Record Runs table in README.md to match
